jobs.title: CTET September 2026 Online Form
jobs.short_information: Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has released the Central Teacher Eligibility Test CTET September 2026 Exam Notification. Those Candidates are Interested with CTET Can Apply Online from 11/05/2026 to 10/06/2026 .candidates should read the CTET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the CTET exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Primary and Junior Level, information and other types of information and then apply. Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) Central Teacher Eligibility Test CTET September 2026 CTET September 2026 Exam : Short Details of Notification
jobs.application_fee: For Single Paper : General / OBC / EWS: 1000 /- SC / ST / PH : 500/- For Both Paper Primary / Junior : General / OBC / EWS: 1200 /- SC / ST / PH : 600 /- Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking or E Challan CBSE CTET September 2026 Exam

text_sections.section: How to Fill CTET September 2026 Exam Online Form
text_sections.content: Central Board of Secondary Education CBSE Are Released the Central Teacher Eligibility Test CTET Paper I to V & VI to VIII Exam September 2026. Candidate Can Apply Online 11/05/2026 to 10/06/2026. | Note: This year the exam centers are limited in every city, the information of which will be seen live by the candidate while filling the form. All the candidates who want their nearest exam center / city should apply as soon as possible because the slots of the exam city are limited. | Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Teacher Eligibility Test Application Form in Central TET CTET Exam Latest Online Form for September 2026. | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. | If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. jobs.title: Bihar BPSC 72 Pre Exam Online Form 2026 for 1186 Post
jobs.short_information: Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) has released the notification for the recruitment of Integrated 72nd Combined (Preliminary) Competitive Exam 2026. Those Candidates Are Interested to the Following BPSC 72 Pre Exam 2026 Vacancy Can Apply Online from 07/05/2026 to 31/05/2026. See the advertisement for information related to age limit, syllabus, Department wise post, selection procedure, pay scale in BPSC Integrated 72nd Combined (Preliminary) Competitive Recruitment 2026. Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) Bihar BPSC Integrated 72nd Combined (Preliminary) Competitive Exam 2026 Bihar BPSC 72nd CCE Exam 2026 : Short Details of Notification

jobs.title: Rajasthan RSSB Teaching Associate Online Form 2026 for 3540 Post
jobs.short_information: Rajasthan Staff Selection Board RSSB RSMSSB has released the Contractual Teaching Associate Advt No 06/2026 Notification 2026. Those candidates who are Enrolled in this Rajasthan Contractual Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 Exam can Apply Online from 05/05/2026 to 03/06/2026. Read the notification for RSSB Contractual Teaching Associate Exam, eligibility, Subject Details information, Document Required, age limit, How to Apply and all other information. Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) | RSMSSB RSSB Contractual Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 Rajasthan Teaching Associate Advt No. : 06/2026 : Short Details of Notification
jobs.application_fee: General / OBC : 600/- OBC NCL : 400/- SC / ST : 400/- Correction Charge : 300/- This fee is for one time registration, now after paying the OTR fee once, the candidate will not have to pay the application fee again and again. Pay the Exam Fee Through Emitra CSC Center, Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking. RSMSSB Contractual Teaching Associate

jobs.title: UPESSC UP Assistant Professor BEd Online Form 2026 for 107 Post
jobs.short_information: Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission UPESSC has relased UPHESC Assistant Professor BEd Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this Uttar Pradesh UP Assistant Professor Recruitment 2025 Exam can Re Apply Apply Online from 28 April 2026 to 27 May 2026. Read the notification for UPHESC Assistant Professor BEd Exam, eligibility, Subject Details information, Document Required, age limit, How to Apply and all other information. Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission UPESSC UPESSC UP Assistant Professor BEd Recruitment 2025 UPHESC Asst. Professor Advt No. : 51| Short Details of Notification
jobs.application_fee: General/OBC/EWS : 2000/- SC / ST / PH : 1000/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Online Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking or Pay the Exam Fee Through Offline Mode Only. UPHESC Assistant Professor
jobs.eligibility: Assistant Professor Bed 107 Master Degree in Science / Mathematics / Social Science / Commerce / Language (BED Subjects) with Minimum 55% Marks, M.Ed Exam with 55% Marks OR Master Degree in Sociology with 55% Marks with B.Ed / BLEd / Equivalent Degree. UGC NET / PHd / D.Phill More Details Read the Notification How to Fill UPHESC Assistant Professor Online Form 2026 Note : Applicants who have already applied under the B.Ed subject need to apply again. Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission UPESSC, Uttar Pradesh Higher Education Service Commission UPHESC 51 Are Issued Assistant Professor BEd Subject Recruitment 2025 – Advt No. 51. Candidate Can Re Apply Apply Between 28/04/2026 to 27/05/2026. Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in UPESSC Advt No. 51 Assistant Professor BEd Subject Recruitment 2025. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form. Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online.
